name: Administrator
description: Grants every permission and bypasses channel-specific overrides. Required only for security-critical commands (Anti-Raid, Anti-Spam, Security setup, DM broadcast).

name: Manage Guild
description: Required for most configuration commands — welcome, verify, invite, logs, keyword, AutoMod, ticket, announce.

name: Manage Roles
description: Required for auto-role setup and any command that assigns / removes roles.

name: Manage Channels
description: Required for ticket creation, /vc lock and temp voice setup.

name: Manage Messages
description: Required for every /purge command and anti-spam warning reset.

name: Moderate Members
description: Required for timeout-based actions in Anti-Spam and Anti-Raid.

name: Kick Members
description: Required when Anti-Raid or Anti-Spam action is set to Kick.

name: Ban Members
description: Required when Anti-Raid action is set to Ban.
